# Agently Review: Pricing, Features, Pros & Cons

Agently is like your modern real estate coach equipped with an innovative toolkit to streamline operations and maximize productivity.

Written By 
Kaylee V. Sanchez

Kaylee V. Sanchez

Oct 13, 2025

 ·   4 minute read

The Close content and product recommendations are editorially independent. We may make money when you click on links to our partners.  Learn More

Agently is like your modern real estate coach equipped with an innovative toolkit to streamline operations and maximize productivity. Agently’s capabilities to store customizable onboarding checklists and training modules, as well as track financial goals, make it easy for brokers to support their team’s professional development. [...] ## Agently Pricing

Agently doesn’t list pricing publicly; plans are quote-based, with a seven-day free trial to test before you buy. If your team is evaluating platforms, build your quote around the factors below and ask for an apples-to-apples proposal.

BOOK A DEMO WITH AGENTLY

Advertisement

## Frequently asked questions (FAQs)

Agently is an agent development platform built to streamline onboarding, training, coaching, and accountability. It’s designed to connect day-to-day agent actions to production, and it can integrate with your CRM and transaction data, so training and coaching map to real outcomes. [...] Teams using AI are three times more effective at hitting sales goals, so Agently’s mix of structured training and AI helpers can give your agents a lift. We reviewed Agently’s key features, compared alternatives, and weighed the pros and cons to help you decide if it’s worth it! 🚀

 Agently: Our take
 Agently pros & cons
 Agently alternatives
 Key features of Agently
 Agently Pricing
 Frequently asked questions (FAQs)
 Bottom line: Is Agently worth your money?

## Agently: Our take

Agently is best for solo agents and small teams who want structured onboarding, training, and coaching backed by simple marketing tools. It’s less suited for larger brokerages that need enterprise-level integrations or advanced marketing automation.

Where Agently stands out

Every other tool answers, retrieves, or runs brittle rules. Agently holds your whole company in context and does the work. 100+ connectors flow into one brain that never forgets. It links a Stripe event to a Slack thread to a Linear ticket on its own. When something needs doing, Jarvis routes it to an agent that runs it end to end: triggered, running, shipped. The work lands without you, nothing falls through the cracks. Connecting takes minutes. The layer between today's AI and tomorrow's AGI.

Report

Abdul Rehman

Triforce Todos

Triforce Todos

Been watching Agently take shape and this is the launch I've been waiting for. The thing that clicks for me: everyone's shipping "agents," but an agent with no memory of your company is just a chatbot with extra steps. Building the brain first is the right bet. Huge congrats to the team 🔥 Curious what the first workflow most teams reach for once it's connected?

Report

Maker [...] Report

Muhammad Tanveer Abbas

Really interesting launch. The strongest part for me is the persistent context across tools not just another AI assistant answering prompts, but a system that can connect events and move work forward automatically.   
  
Curious how do you keep the shared memory accurate and prevent outdated context from affecting decisions?   
  
Congrats on the launch! 🚀

## Best-rated agent development platform for real estate

## Previously, I had to stitch together multiple different systems and spreadsheets to run my team. Tool overload led to lower agent adoption and productivity. Agently creates a scalable and repeatable system for me to onboard, train, retaining and get agents producing.

##### Jaime Resendiz

Team Leader, Agent First Group

#### Real Estate Brokerage Software: Top 33 Picks for 2024

#### NAR selects Agently among the 12 leading real estate tech startups

Agently is real estate's #1 Agent Development System for teams. Onboard faster, deliver training, develop agents to clear productivity standards and filter out underperformers early. Hit production goal without added workload with a scalable system for agent success.

In this article, I share two other levers that are vastly overlooked:  [Likes: 1, Comments: 0]; Agently (2w): Instead of being told what to do, agents can now see how every action they take today leads to their next commission check tomorrow. No chasing, no hard accountability. [Likes: 1, Comments: 0]; Agently (2w): - This team had a PDF onboarding checklist. Here's what changed. - Team Peterson-Jackson runs 80+ agents across Detroit and Houston. - Their problem wasn't recruiting. They were growing fast. - The problem was every new agent had a different experience depending on who happened to be available that day. - They rebuilt their entire onboarding inside Agently. - Every module.
